description:
📈 ALL Systems: https://bit.ly/4kol0y5
🔥 Type with your Voice: https://glaido.com
🎙️ My Goofy pod: https://bit.ly/46nLQ3U

Gemini just dropped a new embedding model that natively understands text, images, video, audio, and documents and when you pair it with CLAIDE code, you unlock incredible capabilities. In this video I'll show you the setup, what it can actually do, and how to build a real business use case around it.

Links
🚀 AntiGravity: https://antigravity.google/
☁️ Claude: https://claude.ai/
🌲 Pinecone: https://www.pinecone.io/
🧬 Gemini: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/embeddings
